news.t: The Grizzle Growth ETF Partners with Cambria Investments to Deliver "Disruption at a Reasonable Price" (DARP)

holdings.infoBox: DARP is an equity ETF with a total of 46 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 15.52%, Micron Technology at 10.10%, NVIDIA at 8.20%, Coherent at 5.83%, and Amazon.com at 4.72%.

overview.description: The Grizzle Growth ETF (DARP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund is an actively managed fund of global stocks involved in four key growth themes: Digitization and Cloud Computing, Future Media and Entertainment, Health and Wellness, and Sustainability and Energy Transition. DARP was launched on Dec 17, 2021 and is issued by Grizzle.

data.title: The Grizzle Growth ETF Partners with Cambria Investments to Deliver "Disruption at a Reasonable Price" (DARP)
